name: Nestle's Toll House Pan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, cream together the butter, brown sugar, white sugar, and vanilla extract until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips and nuts.
5. Pour the batter into an ungreased 15-1/2 x 10-1/2-inch pan.
6. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Allow to cool before serving.
